html:
PRESCRIPTION

SAHPRA Compliant Prescription

PRESCRIBER INFORMATION

Name: {%- if doc.practitioner -%} {%- set practitioner = frappe.get_doc('Healthcare Practitioner', doc.practitioner) -%} {{ practitioner.practitioner_name or practitioner.name }} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%}

HPCSA Registration: {%- if doc.practitioner -%} {%- set practitioner = frappe.get_doc('Healthcare Practitioner', doc.practitioner) -%} {{ practitioner.hpcsa_registration_number or 'N/A' }} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%}

Practice Number: {%- if doc.practitioner -%} {%- set practitioner = frappe.get_doc('Healthcare Practitioner', doc.practitioner) -%} {{ practitioner.practice_number or 'N/A' }} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%}

Physical Address:

{%- if doc.practitioner -%} {%- set practitioner = frappe.get_doc('Healthcare Practitioner', doc.practitioner) -%} {%- if practitioner.practice_address -%} {{ practitioner.practice_address }} {%- elif practitioner.practitioner_primary_address -%} {%- set address = frappe.get_doc('Address', practitioner.practitioner_primary_address) -%} {{ address.address_line1 or '' }} {%- if address.address_line2 -%}
{{ address.address_line2 }}{%- endif -%} {%- if address.city -%}
{{ address.city }}{%- endif -%} {%- if address.state -%}, {{ address.state }}{%- endif -%} {%- if address.pincode -%} {{ address.pincode }}{%- endif -%} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%}

PATIENT INFORMATION

Full Name: {%- if doc.patient -%} {%- set patient = frappe.get_doc('Patient', doc.patient) -%} {{ patient.patient_name or patient.name }} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%}

ID Number: {%- if doc.patient -%} {%- set patient = frappe.get_doc('Patient', doc.patient) -%} {{ patient.uid or 'N/A' }} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%}

Age: {{ doc.patient_age or 'N/A' }}

Gender: {{ doc.patient_sex or 'N/A' }}

Physical Address:

{%- if doc.patient -%} {%- set patient = frappe.get_doc('Patient', doc.patient) -%} {%- set addresses = frappe.get_all('Address', filters=[['Dynamic Link', 'link_doctype', '=', 'Patient'], ['Dynamic Link', 'link_name', '=', patient.name]], fields=['*'], order_by='is_primary_address DESC', limit=1) -%} {%- if addresses -%} {%- set address = addresses[0] -%} {{ address.address_line1 or '' }} {%- if address.address_line2 -%}
{{ address.address_line2 }}{%- endif -%} {%- if address.city -%}
{{ address.city }}{%- endif -%} {%- if address.state -%}, {{ address.state }}{%- endif -%} {%- if address.pincode -%} {{ address.pincode }}{%- endif -%} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%} {%- else -%} N/A {%- endif -%}

PRESCRIPTION DETAILS

Date of Issue: {{ doc.encounter_date or frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.utils.today()) }}

{%- if doc.diagnosis -%}

Diagnosis:

{%- for diag in doc.diagnosis -%} {{ diag.diagnosis }}{%- if not loop.last -%}, {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endif -%} {%- if doc.symptoms -%}

Complaints/Symptoms:

{%- for symptom in doc.symptoms -%} {{ symptom.complaint }}{%- if not loop.last -%}, {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endif -%}
{%- if doc.drug_prescription -%}

MEDICATIONS PRESCRIBED

{%- for medication in doc.drug_prescription -%}
{%- if medication.strength -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if medication.number_of_repeats_allowed -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if medication.comment -%} {%- endif -%}
Medicine Name: {{ medication.drug_name or medication.medication or 'N/A' }}
Strength: {{ medication.strength }} {{ medication.strength_uom or '' }}
Dosage Form: {{ medication.dosage_form or 'N/A' }}
Dosage Instructions: {%- if medication.dosage_by_interval -%} Every {{ medication.interval or '' }} {{ medication.interval_uom or 'days' }} {%- if medication.dosage -%}: {{ medication.dosage }}{%- endif -%} {%- else -%} {{ medication.dosage or 'N/A' }} {%- endif -%}
Period/Quantity: {{ medication.period or 'N/A' }}
Repeats Allowed: {{ medication.number_of_repeats_allowed }}
Additional Instructions: {{ medication.comment }}
{%- endfor -%}
{%- endif -%}

This prescription complies with SAHPRA (South African Health Products Regulatory Authority) requirements

Encounter Reference: {{ doc.name }}

Generated on: {{ frappe.utils.format_datetime(frappe.utils.now(), 'dd MMM yyyy HH:mm') }}
name: SAHPRA Prescription
